Title: ALTER TABLE ALTER COLUMN
Description: Change column nullability or default value or storage
See also: ALTER TABLE RENAME COLUMN ,
ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN , ALTER TABLE DROP COLUMN , [ ALTER TABLE DROP CONSTRAINT .
Examples:
ALTER TABLE [ IF EXISTS ] [
schema_name
'.' ]
table_name
ALTER [ COLUMN ]
column_name
{ SET NULL | SET NOT NULL | SET DEFAULT
value
| DROP DEFAULT | SET STORAGE {
string
| NULL} }
